title: Battleworn Dummy
description:
As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!

"[jitter]BZZZT![/jitter] TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE [blue]3 TURNS[/blue] TO DEFEAT ME!
CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE [red]LETHAL HUMILIATION[/red].
Here are the options:"

After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.

What do you choose?

options.title: Setting 1
options.description: Fight a [blue]75[/blue] HP dummy. Procure [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Potion[/gold].

options.title: Setting 2
options.description: Fight a [blue]150[/blue] HP dummy. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards.

options.title: Setting 3
options.description: Fight a [blue]300[/blue] HP dummy. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes:
A training encounter where you must defeat the selected dummy within [blue]3 turns[/blue]. Each setting has increasing difficulty and different rewards for victory.

[gold]Mechanics:[/gold]
• The dummy performs no actions (uses NOTHING_MOVE)
• Victory requires defeating the dummy in [blue]3 turns[/blue] or less
• Defeat triggers a [red]humiliation[/red] message instead of victory rewards
• Dummy HP values are base values; they scale with player count in multiplayer runs

[gold]Victory Rewards by Setting:[/gold]
• [gold]Setting 1:[/gold] 1 random [gold]Potion[/gold] from your character's potion pool (uses shared pool if character pool is empty)
• [gold]Setting 2:[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random [blue]upgradeable cards[/blue] from your deck are upgraded
• [gold]Setting 3:[/gold] 1 random [gold]Relic[/gold] (pulled from the front of the standard relic pool)

[gold]Note:[/gold] You continue your run regardless of victory or defeat. This is purely an optional training challenge.
